title: Junior Investment Banker at HDFC Securities Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at HDFC Securities Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities Digital Technologies in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities Digital Technologies:
HDFC Securities Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities Digital Technologies!
